body.body: Implement #243. Async NE-pattern runner that watches main pipeline outputs over time. Habit subtree: fires on Igor own output patterns as triggers. Pushes observations back into TWM. Wire inward-facing watchlist entries (watch_direction=inward in metadata). Prerequisite: T-meaning-to-me-244 must be done first. Post plan before implementing.
body.title: Self-observation habit subtree (#243)
body.result:
PLAN (awaiting Designer approval):

SCOPE: Add SelfObservationSource push source + inward watch habit type + seed habits.

## What 'inward watch' means
Current watch habits fire on user INPUT patterns (BG selects from user input).
Inward watch fires on IGOR'S OWN OUTPUT patterns — metadata.watch_direction='inward'.
The trigger field matches against response_text, not user input.

## Files touched
1. wild_igor/igor/cognition/push_sources.py (LOW) — add SelfObservationSource class
   - Runs every 30s
   - Reads last N 'IGOR_SAID' entries from ring_memory (ring has them via write_ring at line 4098)
   - Tracks cursor: only processes entries newer than last run
   - For each IGOR_SAID entry, scores all inward-watch habits against that text
   - On match: pushes SELF_OBS_HIT|{habit_id}|{matched_text[:200]} to TWM at salience 0.5, urgency 0.3, ttl 300s
   - Rate-limited, deduplicates (same habit+same content won't fire twice in 5min)
   Wire into run_background_sources().

2. wild_igor/igor/main.py (MEDIUM) — no logic changes needed
   - 'IGOR_SAID' is already pushed to TWM at line 4132 AND ring at line 4097
   - SelfObservationSource reads from ring — no main.py changes needed

3. claudecode/seed_self_observation_habits.py (new, LOW) — seed 2-3 inward habits:
   - PROC_WATCH_INWARD_UNCERTAIN: trigger='not sure|i don't know|uncertain' → TWM push 'Igor expressed uncertainty'
   - PROC_WATCH_INWARD_CLAIM: trigger='the reason is|this means|therefore|because' → TWM push 'Igor made a causal claim'
   - PROC_WATCH_INWARD_FACTUAL: trigger='according to|research shows|studies show' → TWM push 'Igor cited external source'

## What I will NOT do
- No basal_ganglia changes (inward watches bypass BG scoring path entirely)
- No outward watch handler changes in _process()
- No NE changes (NE already integrates SELF_OBS_HIT TWM entries)
- No schema changes (watch_direction is metadata only)

## Risk
Low — SelfObservationSource is a new class following established BasePushSource pattern.
No changes to critical paths. Worst case: SelfObservationSource crashes silently (run_background_sources already swallows exceptions).

Ready to implement on Designer approval.
